title: Container Widget in Flutter
content:
### Container Widget

`Container` is a versatile widget that combines common painting, positioning, and sizing behaviors.

```dart
Container(
  width: 200,
  height: 200,
  padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
  margin: const EdgeInsets.all(8),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: Colors.blue,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  ),
  child: const Text('Hello'),
)
```

### BoxDecoration

| Property | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `color` | Background color |
| `borderRadius` | Rounded corners |
| `border` | Border styling |
| `boxShadow` | Shadow effects |
| `gradient` | Linear/radial gradient |
| `image` | Background image |
| `shape` | Box or circle |

### Decoration Examples

```dart
// Rounded rectangle with shadow
Container(
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: Colors.white,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
    boxShadow: [
      BoxShadow(
        color: Colors.black.withOpacity(0.1),
        blurRadius: 10,
        offset: const Offset(0, 4),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)

// Circle avatar
Container(
  width: 100,
  height: 100,
  decoration: const BoxDecoration(
    color: Colors.amber,
    shape: BoxShape.circle,
  ),
)

// Gradient background
Container(
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    gradient: LinearGradient(
      begin: Alignment.topLeft,
      end: Alignment.bottomRight,
      colors: [Colors.blue, Colors.purple],
    ),
  ),
)
```

### Container Properties

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `padding` | `EdgeInsetsGeometry` | Internal spacing |
| `margin` | `EdgeInsetsGeometry` | External spacing |
| `alignment` | `AlignmentGeometry` | Child alignment |
| `width/height` | `double?` | Fixed size |
| `constraints` | `BoxConstraints` | Size constraints |
| `transform` | `Matrix4` | Visual transform |

### Container vs Other Widgets

```dart
// Container is often overused. Consider:
// SizedBox - for fixed size
const SizedBox(width: 100, height: 100)

// Padding - for padding only
const Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.all(16))

// DecoratedBox - for decoration only
DecoratedBox(decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blue))

// Center - for centering
const Center(child: Text('Hi'))
```

> **Key Point:** Container is convenient but heavyweight. Use specialized widgets like SizedBox, Padding, or DecoratedBox when you only need one specific behavior.

quiz.question: Which Container property adds space inside the container?
What widget is best for just a fixed size (no decoration)?
